'''''Whirlwind''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was the lead ship of [[Task Force Whirlwind]] that was supposed to arrive at a convoy that was being ambushed by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s forces to trap them. Unfortunately Zaarin sent his own Immobilizer 418 cruiser called [[Maelstrom (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Maelstrom'']] to destroy the ''Whirlwind''. The attack was thwarted by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], however, and they were delayed long enough to be unable to trap them so Stele had to be sent to save the convoy.
